statements.name: Review team goal prior to Kaizen event.
Document and take photos of before state.
Identify the seven types of waste.
Update current state map during the event.
Meet with stakeholders and keep them informed.
Complete daily recap and present to management.
Create PDCA worksheet and update it regularly.

categories.name: Follow-Up
categories.description: Follow-up phase requiring enhanced sustainment and improvement tracking

statements.name: Continue to communicate and stay engaged.
Apply Kaizen to Kaizen (improve the improvement process).
Provide recognition and rewards to team members.

highlightsData.title: Project Initiation Challenges
highlightsData.description:
Business Case Development: Initial improvement justification lacked clear linkage to organizational objectives. Management support secured but resource allocation discussions ongoing. Need stronger business case documentation.

Team Formation: Team charter developed but roles and responsibilities need clarification. Some team members unclear on project scope and success criteria.

highlightsData.title: Planning Phase Progress
highlightsData.description:
Current State Analysis: Basic process mapping completed but detailed analysis still in progress. Team working to understand root causes and establish proper baseline measurements.

Stakeholder Engagement: Mixed engagement from stakeholders - some highly supportive while others require additional convincing. Communication strategy needs refinement.

highlightsData.title: Implementation Attempts
highlightsData.description:
Mixed Execution: Some improvement activities successfully implemented while others face resistance or technical challenges. Team learning through trial and error with varying results.

Documentation Gaps: Inconsistent documentation and tracking of improvement activities. Need better systems for capturing lessons learned and progress monitoring.

actionItems.title: Enhanced Business Case Development
actionItems.description: Strengthen business case with clear strategic alignment, quantified benefits, and robust management engagement strategy

attachments.name: business_case_template.jpg
attachments.description: Comprehensive business case template with strategic alignment framework

actionItems.title: Lean Methodology Training Program
actionItems.description: Implement comprehensive lean training for team members covering PDCA, waste identification, value stream mapping, and A3 problem solving

actionItems.title: Structured Planning Workshop
actionItems.description: Conduct intensive planning workshop focusing on A3 development, SIPOC creation, current state mapping, and stakeholder analysis

actionItems.title: Systematic Implementation Framework
actionItems.description: Establish structured implementation approach with daily reviews, proper documentation protocols, and stakeholder communication plan

actionItems.title: Sustainment and Follow-up System
actionItems.description: Create comprehensive follow-up system including communication protocols, dashboard development, feedback mechanisms, and recognition programs

actionItems.title: Kaizen Mentorship Assignment
actionItems.description: Pair team with experienced Kaizen facilitator for guided improvement and capability building throughout remaining project phases
